chunks.title: The Three Signs
chunks.reason: Moses questions his authority and Yahweh provides three miraculous signs to validate his mission.

chunks.title: Moses' Objections and Aaron's Appointment
chunks.reason: Moses hesitates due to his speech impediment, leading Yahweh to appoint Aaron as his spokesman.

chunks.title: Departure for Egypt
chunks.reason: Moses returns to Jethro, receives permission, and travels back to Egypt with his family.

chunks.title: Instructions for Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses on the message to deliver and warns of the hardening of Pharaoh's heart.

chunks.title: The Encounter at the Lodging Place
chunks.reason: A dramatic incident where Yahweh seeks to kill Moses and Zipporah performs circumcision.

chunks.title: Meeting Aaron and the People
chunks.reason: Aaron meets Moses, they gather the elders, perform signs, and the people believe.
